title: User can search for a bus or line using the search bar
test_steps: Click on the search bar labeled 'Find a bus or line'. | Type 'Taraval' into the search bar. | Press the Enter key to perform the search.
expected_result: The search results should display the 'Taraval' line information.

title: User can navigate to the 'All Lines' section
expected_result: The screen should navigate to the 'All Lines' section displaying a list of all available transit lines.

title: User can access service information for a specific line
test_steps: Click on the 'i' icon next to the 'Taraval' line.
expected_result: The screen should display detailed service information for the 'Taraval' line.

title: User can navigate to the 'Maps' section
expected_result: The screen should navigate to the 'Maps' section displaying the Muni Metro map.

title: User can set a destination using the 'SET' button
test_steps: Click on the 'SET' button on the header.
expected_result: The screen should prompt the user to set a destination for navigation.

title: User can clear the search bar
test_steps: Type 'Taraval' into the search bar. | Click on the 'X' icon next to the search bar to clear the text.
expected_result: The search bar should be cleared of any text.

title: User can navigate back to the previous screen
test_steps: Navigate to the 'All Lines' section. | Press the back button on the device.
expected_result: The screen should navigate back to the previous screen displaying the 'Lines' section.

title: User can perform a search with an invalid input
test_steps: Click on the search bar labeled 'Find a bus or line'. | Type 'invalid' into the search bar. | Press the Enter key to perform the search.
expected_result: The search results should display an error message indicating that the input is invalid.

title: User can navigate to the 'MAPS' section with an empty search bar
expected_result: The screen should navigate to the 'Maps' section displaying the Muni Metro map.

title: User can navigate to the 'All Lines' section with an empty search bar
expected_result: The screen should navigate to the 'All Lines' section displaying a list of all available transit lines.
